item.title: Trust modes + heartbeat + command queue
item.intent: Implement three trust modes so users choose their privacy level. Kill switch must disconnect immediately. Signed command queue must reject tampered commands.
item.description: MANAGED MODE FOUNDATION: Trust modes are what makes the cloud layer safe by design. Paranoid users run fully offline. Zero-Trust users get optional remote monitoring without any inbound access. Managed users get operational automation with content architecturally blocked. Kill switch ('clawhq cloud disconnect') with no confirmation prompt is the user's emergency brake. Signed command queue prevents malicious commands even if cloud is compromised. Acceptance: all three trust modes switch cleanly; kill switch disconnects immediately; command signature verified before execution; unsupported commands rejected in all modes.
steps: Implement paranoid, zero-trust, and managed trust modes
Add kill switch ('clawhq cloud disconnect') with no confirmation prompt
Implement signed command queue with signature verification
acceptanceCriteria: All three trust modes switch cleanly
Kill switch disconnects immediately with no prompt
Unsupported commands rejected in all modes
